narrative:
Fort Loramie Local Sd (Shelby) school district has 2,784 registered voters, with 51.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.2 percentage points.
